case_title: BERNABE BERNADES VS. WESTERN DENTAL SERIVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNADES, BERNABE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERIVICES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $756.00 FILED BY BERNADES, BERNABE AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERIVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNADES, BERNABE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-27-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERIVICES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERIVICES, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE QUEENA HO. FILED BY BERNADES, BERNABE WESTERN DENTAL SERIVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GEORGE WESTPHALEN, DDS--MANAGING DENTIST FOR WDS AND SANDRA DOANE--OFFICE MANAGER FOR WDS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNADES, BERNABE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERIVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
